title: USDA-AFRI Organic Transitions Program
description_short: Epidemiology and IPM of fungal pathogens under certified-organic management in specialty crops
highlights: Multi-site RCBD field trials; UAV multispectral disease mapping; biological control evaluation; grower advisory workshops

title: CFCAB Fungicide Efficacy Trials
funder: Center for Food Agriculture and the Built Environment
description_short: Systematic evaluation of fungicide programs against Botrytis gray mold anthracnose and powdery mildew in strawberry
highlights: 10-16 treatment arms per trial; FRAC-based rotation programs; fungicide sensitivity assays; annual grower fact sheets
